item_specifications.special_feature: Airline Approved, Durable, Easy Assembly, Portable

about_item: IATA AIRLINE COMPLIANT TRAVEL CRATE: Compliant with the standards specified in the 51st Edition of the IATA Live Animal Regulation for safe, secure air travel—The Kennel features a durable hard-sided exterior plastic shell, steady airflow and visibility built-in, accident moat pulls spills away from your pet’s body, airline-required tie-down holes for added security, reinforced metal hardware, and a strong secure door latch to keep dogs and cats safely contained during air travel.

EASY TRANSPORT FOR AIR TRAVEL: Designed for easy airport navigation, with smooth-rolling wheels for effortless airport transport and a built-in top carry handle for quick lifting through terminals, security checkpoints, loading areas, and in & out of the car—making it a convenient dog travel kennel and airline pet carrier for stress-free pet travel.

TRAVEL READY ACCESSORIES: Includes 2 sturdy food/water dishes, 4 “Live Animal” labels to alert handlers, and metal bolts and nuts for assembly, making this kennel ideal for safe pet transport or comfortable use at home, hotels, or vacation stays.

COLLAPSIBLE & EASY TO CLEAN: Conveniently separate the kennel into two pieces for compact storage when not in use. Cleanup is simple—wipe down with mild soap and water, or hose out for a thorough clean, keeping your pet’s travel crate fresh and hygienic.

FITS MEDIUM DOGS: Designed for pets up to 23”L x 15”H; interior crate dimensions measure 24.25”L x 18”W x 17”H—ideal for medium breeds like a French Bulldog to stand, turn, and rest comfortably while traveling.

summary.text: Customers find the airline kennel durable and well-built, with one mentioning it survived a flight without damage. Moreover, the size is spacious enough for pets, and customers appreciate its easy assembly and portability for travel. Additionally, the wheels are particularly helpful for moving pets around, and customers like that the wheels snap on and off easily. They consider the product worth its price.

authors_reviews.title: Small, no wheels perfect for my fat 24 lb cat
authors_reviews.text: Can’t understand why this is a frequently returned item. Maybe because it’s larger than what people think? I have a 24 pound big cat and have been traveling with him in a medium size metal crate. Crate is too big and I think he would prefer something smaller so he feels safer because he hates to travel. We’re typically in the car no more than 2.5-3.5 hours. Have looked at a number of pet carriers because he’s so big that most the small crates are too small, he would destroy a soft crate and the larger crates are too big. Found this one and it was purrfect. He can stand up and he can turn around because he’s a cat, even though he’s morbidly obese he’s amazingly bendy and squashy. He also didn’t allow me to put it together before he claimed it. I had to assemble it with him in it and assembly was very easy, great design. Excellent sturdy construction, we do not plan on traveling in a plane so I can’t speak for that, the “certificate” it came with saying it was plane compliant was dated 2013. Things may have changed since then but there’s no way an animal is getting out of this without assistance. If you’re planning to travel on a plane, just try to make sure there will be no loose monkeys because they could definitely figure out how to open the door. We will be taking a trip fairly soon and I hope that he is happier in this than he was in the metal crate. Of course he wouldn’t cooperate to get a side-by-side picture and he looks too big in the video where he’s standing on top, but the crate accommodates him beautifully. Well ventilated, but won’t allow him to stick his fat paw through to claw shred my car, cool water/food dishes and stickers to stick all over it letting everyone know it contains a LIVE ANIMAL.Could also be used for a raccoon as long as his hands were not too tiny, so as not to reach them through the door to open it from the outside.
authors_reviews.author: S ONeal

authors_reviews.title: Great!
authors_reviews.text: The “small size” is perfect for my cat. I recommend this product because it feels well made and sturdy. It is worth it! The price is very convenient.I’m happy with the purchase.
authors_reviews.author: Carolina

authors_reviews.title: Absolute Quality
authors_reviews.text: I have a 12-year-old domestic longhair cat that at one point was 24 lbs. A lot of people who see him mistake him for a Maine Coon. I have a normal-sized pet carrier that I've been putting him in, and he doesn't have room to do anything. That's because a foldable canvas one I WAS using, was torn up by a stray I had to house in it briefly, and then 2 more kittens eventually tore it up more so they could squeeze through and escape.I met a woman the last time I was at the vet, who had a nice carrier for her cat. It was about the size of the canvas carrier I previously used. She couldn't remember where she got it, though. So, I went searching on Amazon after measuring the current carrier and the canvas carrier, to find something that would work. I came across this, and just put it together this morning. It was insanely easy to assemble. I appreciated that.I am thoroughly impressed with it. It is very sturdy. I would say it's good for pets that are about the size of a Maine Coon, or a Corgi. Lots of room. They also sell a pet bed that fits in it nicely, which I purchased. The best part is that the carrier has wheels that can snap in and out easily while being completely locked into place. So, you can use wheels on it, or not.I highly recommend this carrier, especially if you're traveling... the wheels would make that a breeze (but could also be an issue with rolling around an airplane, or vehicle if not strapped into place).
authors_reviews.author: Sumo

authors_reviews.title: Worked for air travel with my GSD!
authors_reviews.text: Absolute game-changer for traveling with my German Shepperd. It’s incredibly sturdy and well-built, with thick plastic walls and a strong wire door that feels secure and reliable. My dog immediately felt comfortable inside because the crate is very spacious, giving him plenty of room to stand, turn around, and lie down without feeling cramped.Used it for airplane travelOne of the best features is the smooth-rolling wheels, which make moving the crate effortless—even when you’ve got a 80+ lb dog inside. The wheels snap on and off easily, which is perfect for airport travel. Assembly was surprisingly simple, and the crate meets airline requirements, giving me peace of mind for flights.Update: Wheels started to come out, I had to glue them.
authors_reviews.author: Angel A.

authors_reviews.title: Great cage made by a great company!
authors_reviews.text: This is a fantastic kennel; we didn't get it for dogs, we got it for our ferrets for when we travel. It's huge, it's easy to put together, it's super secure and it breaks back down for storage (and you can stack them either XL -> XL -> XL -> XL or XL -> L -> M -> S; so it's real large can but can easily have a minimal impact depending on how you choose to store it.But then this is also made by SportPet Designs; I don't want to say what my situation was specifically but I can tell you that this company took care of my issue without hesitation; as a result, they got my loyalty and when I need more cages, I'll be coming right back to them.
authors_reviews.author: Joe

authors_reviews.title: Great kennel
authors_reviews.text: I’m very happy with this kennel. Very sturdy. I thought that it would be too big for my cat, but actually it is just right. He is not cramped up in it.
authors_reviews.author: nora

other_countries_reviews.title: Great for Air Travel – Spacious, Sturdy, and Safe
other_countries_reviews.text: We used this crate for our trip to California from YYZ, and it worked perfectly. Our furbaby is a mini Aussiedoodle, and while we probably could have gone with a smaller size, I’m so glad we chose this one. The extra space let him move around comfortably, just like in his crate at home. I was able to add a couple of his toys, one of his beds for padding, and even our shirts for scent and comfort—everything fit nicely and helped him feel safe and familiar.We also started preparing him for the trip in advance by doing daily “loops” around our condo with the crate. We called it his “plane room,” and used that phrase consistently to reinforce that going into the crate meant going on a plane ride. By the time travel day came, he was completely comfortable and confident inside it.The crate comes with easily removable wheels and all the required airline stickers, which made setup simple. The only small downside was that the airport zip ties only fit through one set of holes. Not a huge issue since the crate locks securely, but the airline prefers both the top and bottom zip-tied for extra security.The side windows were another plus—our pup could see what was happening as we wheeled him around the airport, which helped keep him calm.Overall, this crate made traveling so much smoother and gave us peace of mind knowing our furbaby was safe, comfortable, and prepared. Highly recommend for anyone flying with their dog!
other_countries_reviews.author: angelica pulido

other_countries_reviews.title: Exactly what I needed
other_countries_reviews.text: So happy with this purchaseI got the size « small », but it is infact more of a medium size, this small cage is must larger than most small sized cages on the market! my adult cat can sit up and move around in it. It comes with a certificate and « live animal » stickers which make it legit for flying. Its very sturdy, great quality.The outside of the cage is about: 24 L x 16 W x 16 HThe inside of the cage is about: 19,5 L x 12 W x15 HIn the picture I placed the old cage I had (meant for a kitten) next to the « small one » i just purchased, (with the blue arrow), huge differenceKeep in mind that when the door is opened, alot of the space is lost, and the opening, by which the pet enters the cage, becomes smaller than the door itselfgreat for adult cats and small/medium dogs !
other_countries_reviews.author: Math IB

other_countries_reviews.title: Très bonne qualité
other_countries_reviews.text: Cage très bonne qualité et conforme à la description
other_countries_reviews.author: renefarhi

other_countries_reviews.title: Buenísimo
other_countries_reviews.text: Excelente calidad, es gruesa y resistente. Tiene el tamaño adecuado según las medidas ofrecidas como referencia. Viene con todo lo que se menciona incluyendo los stickers y el certificado para poder viajar en avión. Muy recomendado
